name: Caraway Lamb Hotpot
recipeIngredient: 4 tbsp Flour seasoned with salt and pepper
1 tsp Caraway seeds in muslin bag
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine or butter in a large skillet.
2. Add meat and onions; sauté until the meat is browned, about 5 minutes.
3. Arrange alternating layers of meat and onions with sliced potatoes in a casserole dish, finishing with a layer of potatoes.
4. Brush the potato slices with melted margarine or butter.
5. Place bacon on top of the potato layer.
6. Cover the muslin bag of caraway seeds on top of the bacon.
7. Pour warm beef stock into the casserole dish until it reaches just below the rim.
8. Cover the dish and place in a low to medium oven.
9. Cook for approximately 1 1/2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
10. Remove the cover during the last 20 minutes of cooking to allow the potatoes to turn golden and the bacon to crisp.
11. Before serving, remove the caraway seeds from the muslin bag.
